data.name: Capy邮件发送
data.content:
## Output Format

The script returns JSON with send status:

{
  "success": true,
  "message_id": "010001234567890-abcdef...",
  "from": "capy@capymail.ai",
  "to": ["john.doe@example.com"],
  "cc": [],
  "bcc": [],
  "subject": "Hello from Claude",
  "timestamp": "2024-01-22T10:30:00Z",
  "attachments": 0
}
